description: Verify the GUI-facing workflow control plane: authorization, workflow run, task inbox, approval center, audit events, notifications, cancellation, and clarification recovery.

command: set -euo pipefail; tmp=$(mktemp -d); trap 'rm -rf "$tmp"' EXIT; cp -a agent-system "$tmp/agent-system"; cp -a scripts "$tmp/scripts"; export DIGITAL_OFFICE_SYSTEM_HOME="$tmp/agent-system"; office="$tmp/agent-system/bin/office-system"; "$office" project-create --project p1 --name 'Project One' >/dev/null; "$office" auth-decision --tenant t1 --deployment d1 --user u1 --role project_manager --action workflow.start --resource-type workflow_run --resource-id planned --project p1 --agent coder > "$tmp/auth.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys; assert json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))["allowed"] is True' "$tmp/auth.json"; set +e; "$office" auth-decision --tenant t1 --deployment d1 --user u1 --role viewer --action workflow.start --resource-type workflow_run --resource-id planned --project p1 --agent coder > "$tmp/auth-deny.json"; code=$?; set -e; test "$code" -ne 0; "$office" workflow-start --tenant t1 --deployment d1 --user u1 --role project_manager --project p1 --task 'product requirement design ui prototype code implement frontend' --idempotency-key harness-workflow > "$tmp/workflow.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); assert data["status"] == "created" and data["task_status"] == "queued" and data["route"]["agent"] == "coder"' "$tmp/workflow.json"; run_id=$(python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))["run_id"])' "$tmp/workflow.json"); task_id=$(python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))["task_id"])' "$tmp/workflow.json"); "$office" approval-create --tenant t1 --deployment d1 --title 'Approve workflow' --action workflow.continue --resource-type workflow_run --resource-id "$run_id" --requested-by u1 --requested-by-role project_manager --approver-role project_manager --project p1 --workflow-run "$run_id" --task-id "$task_id" > "$tmp/approval.json"; approval_id=$(python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))["approval"]["approval_id"])' "$tmp/approval.json"); set +e; "$office" approval-decision --approval-id "$approval_id" --decision approve --decided-by u1 --role project_manager > "$tmp/no-confirm.json" 2> "$tmp/no-confirm.err"; code=$?; set -e; test "$code" -ne 0; "$office" approval-decision --approval-id "$approval_id" --decision approve --decided-by u1 --role project_manager --confirmed > "$tmp/approval-ok.json"; "$office" task-update --task-id "$task_id" --status completed --summary done --updated-by u1 --role project_manager > "$tmp/task.json"; "$office" workflow-status --run-id "$run_id" > "$tmp/workflow-completed.json"; "$office" audit-events --resource-type approval --resource-id "$approval_id" > "$tmp/audit.json"; "$office" notification-list --user u1 > "$tmp/notifications.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys; assert json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))["status"] == "completed"; assert json.load(open(sys.argv[2]))["status"] == "completed"; assert len(json.load(open(sys.argv[3]))["events"]) >= 1; assert len(json.load(open(sys.argv[4]))["notifications"]) >= 1' "$tmp/task.json" "$tmp/workflow-completed.json" "$tmp/audit.json" "$tmp/notifications.json"; "$office" workflow-start --tenant t1 --deployment d1 --user u1 --role project_manager --project p1 --task 'hello there' > "$tmp/clarify.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); assert data["status"] == "blocked" and data["route"]["agent"] == "secretary"' "$tmp/clarify.json"
